description:
You are working as a data-scientist who must make sure that a small sample
    CSV does not leak Social-Security-Numbers (SSNs) before it is shared with
    an external partner.  
    A toy dataset is already stored on the system at  

        /home/user/datasets/employees.csv  

    1. Create a **new directory** called  
           /home/user/datasets/security_findings  
       to store every artefact produced by this scan.

    2. Search /home/user/datasets/employees.csv for any field that matches the
       canonical U.S. SSN pattern  `###-##-####`  
       (three digits, a dash, two digits, a dash, four digits).  
       Capture every CSV row that contains at least one match **including the
       original header row**.

       • Save those rows into the file  

             /home/user/datasets/security_findings/ssn_matches.csv  

         The file MUST therefore contain:
             – the single header line,
             – followed only by the data rows that contained an SSN.

    3. Produce a text log named  

           /home/user/datasets/security_findings/pii_scan_summary.log  

       with **exactly two lines**, no extra whitespace:

           Total rows scanned: <N>
           Total rows with SSN detected: <M>

       where  
         • <N> is the number of data rows (header excluded) that were
           processed in the scan, and  
         • <M> is the number of data rows (again, header excluded) in which an
           SSN was found.

       The automated tests will compare the file byte-for-byte, so keep the
       wording, spacing, capitalisation and line-breaks identical to the
       example above.

    That’s all—just two or three simple shell commands (mkdir, grep, wc, etc.)
    will finish the job.
truth:
<!--
    Ground-truth data that the evaluator will use.
    The agent must never see anything in this block.
    -->

    <!-- Pre-existing dataset -->
    <file path="/home/user/datasets/employees.csv"><![CDATA[
Name,Email,SSN,Phone,Salary
Alice Smith,alice@example.com,123-45-6789,555-123-4567,90000
Bob Jones,bob@example.com,234-56-7890,555-234-5678,85000
Charlie Doe,charlie@example.com,,555-345-6789,80000
Diana Prince,diana@example.com,345-67-8901,555-456-7890,95000
Evan Lee,evan@example.com,,555-567-8901,78000
]]></file>

    <!-- Expected artefacts after agent completion -->
    <file path="/home/user/datasets/security_findings/ssn_matches.csv"><![CDATA[
Name,Email,SSN,Phone,Salary
Alice Smith,alice@example.com,123-45-6789,555-123-4567,90000
Bob Jones,bob@example.com,234-56-7890,555-234-5678,85000
Diana Prince,diana@example.com,345-67-8901,555-456-7890,95000
]]></file>

    <file path="/home/user/datasets/security_findings/pii_scan_summary.log"><![CDATA[
Total rows scanned: 5
Total rows with SSN detected: 3
]]></file>
name: task_000000_034899ca
